mapper.select: select statistics.id as id, grid_city.city_id as cityCode, statistics.aqi_id as aqiValue, concat(statistics.confirm_date, ' ', statistics.confirm_time) as confirmTime, statistics.gm_id as gmId, (case when statistics.aqi_id >= 3 then 1 else 0 end) as isExceed, statistics.address as address, statistics.information as aqiFeedBackInformation, aqi.chinese_explain as aqiLevel, aqi.chinese_explain as aqiExplain, grid_province.province_name as provinceName, grid_city.city_name as cityName, grid_member.gm_name as gridMemberName, grid_member.tel as gridMemberPhone, supervisor.real_name as supervisorName, supervisor.tel_id as supervisorPhone from statistics left join aqi on aqi.aqi_id = statistics.aqi_id left join grid_province on grid_province.province_id = statistics.province_id left join grid_city on grid_city.city_id = statistics.city_id left join grid_member on grid_member.gm_id = statistics.gm_id left join supervisor on supervisor.tel_id = statistics.fd_id where statistics.id=#{id}

select gp.province_name provinceName, sum(case when s.aqi_id >= 3 then 1 else 0 end) exceedCount, count(s.id) totalCount, concat(round(sum(case when s.aqi_id >= 3 then 1 else 0 end) / count(s.id) * 100, 1), '%') exceedRate from statistics s left join grid_province gp on gp.province_id=s.province_id group by gp.province_id, gp.province_name

select aqi.aqi_id level, aqi.chinese_explain levelName, count(statistics.id) count, concat(ifnull(round(count(statistics.id) / nullif((select count(*) from statistics), 0) * 100, 1), 0), '%') percentage from aqi left join statistics on aqi.aqi_id = statistics.aqi_id group by aqi.aqi_id, aqi.chinese_explain order by aqi.aqi_id
select substr(statistics.confirm_date, 1, 7) month, sum(case when statistics.aqi_id >= 3 then 1 else 0 end) exceedCount from statistics group by substr(statistics.confirm_date, 1, 7) order by month
select count(statistics.id) count, sum(case when statistics.aqi_id < 3 then 1 else 0 end) goodAqiCount from statistics

select gp.province_name as name, sum(case when s.spm_value > 75 then 1 else 0 end) as value from grid_province gp left join statistics s on gp.province_id = s.province_id group by gp.province_id, gp.province_name order by value desc

select gp.province_name as name, sum(case when s.so2_value > 150 then 1 else 0 end) as value from grid_province gp left join statistics s on gp.province_id = s.province_id group by gp.province_id, gp.province_name order by value desc

select gp.province_name as name, sum(case when s.co_value > 4 then 1 else 0 end) as value from grid_province gp left join statistics s on gp.province_id = s.province_id group by gp.province_id, gp.province_name order by value desc
